workflowStages.name: Capture
workflowStages.description: Collect AI coding sessions and source context into a local inventory.

workflowStages.name: Structure
workflowStages.description: Convert scattered instructions into project rules and spec-ready context.

workflowStages.name: Execute
workflowStages.description: Preserve commands, workflows, and implementation paths that agents can reuse.

workflowStages.name: Verify
workflowStages.description: Keep review, test, and risk checks close to generated AI work.

workflowStages.name: Publish
workflowStages.description: Export clean artifacts for GitHub, documentation, and personal positioning.

recommendations: Lead with Context Engineering. It is the strongest signal in the current context map.
Keep exports separate from source files; apply generated rules manually after review.
